content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.86% breaking below 24,000 with VIX surging +7.84% to 18.16 signals risk-off. Pharma and IT showing relative strength (defensive bid), while Realty, PSU Banks, Auto, Energy under heavy pressure. Existing book is broadly green on FMCG/Pharma/IT names; focus is on locking gains via SL trails rather than chasing new entries late in a high-VIX session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF at 123.60, near SL 121. Thesis (safe-haven bid amid West Asia tensions, weak INR) intact. SL placement at 121 already tight (~2%); no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 835.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.2% gain at 845.95 with SL already at 835 (breakeven+, locks ~+1.8% min). Trail-gap = 1.3% below CMP, satisfies Rule 14(c) ≥1% floor. Stock at fresh 52w high post Q4 beat. No-op MODIFY actually — SL already at 835 stored, keep as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.7% unrealized, largest winner. Current SL 1360 = +8% above entry (1259), already locks +8%. CMP 1383 → trail-gap = 1.7%, satisfies Rule 14(c). Strong Q4 (+30% YoY rev, $1.75B order book), brokerage TPs Rs 1,690-2,020. SL=stored target=stored — this is no-op; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% at 2793, SL 2740 (~2% below entry). Q4 PAT +47% YoY, refrigerants capex thesis intact. Too early to trail (gain too small)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "At 52w high 9068 (entry 9100, -0.3%). 3.3x volume + brokerage TPs Rs 9,740-10,500. Stored SL = proposed SL — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% at 10601, SL 10440 (~3% below entry). Buyback at Rs 12,000 (record May 29) provides price floor. Q4 standalone PAT +34%. Thesis intact; SL placement appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.8% at 478.40, SL 470 (~3.5% below entry). Q4 PAT +16% YoY, mgmt guidance upgrade to low double-digit FY27. Recovering today (+1.79%). Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.8% at 1270, SL 1255 (above entry 1226 = breakeven+2.4% lock). Trail-gap = 1.2%, satisfies Rule 14(c). Stored SL = proposed — no-op; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% at 1251.60, SL 1198 (~4% below entry). +8.58% sector-leading move today on Q4 beat. Wait for more cushion before trailing; structural breakout above 52w high (1220.90)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% at 862.60, SL 850 (~1.7% below entry). Order book +61% YoY, sector tailwind intact. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at 8081, SL 7950 (~1.8% below entry). Q4 results May 20 (binary event in ~7 sessions, outside 3-session Rule 11 trigger). Hold position with tight SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at 1871.70 (+2% intraday), SL 1830 (~2.4% below entry). Q4 board mid-May — within Rule 11 window potentially. Halol OAI overhang flagged in research. Hold with current SL; assess once results date is firm."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% at 1648, SL 1610 (~3.6% below entry). Q4 PAT -15% YoY a negative; diagnostics sector hot but stock-specific underperformance. Hold to SL; thesis weakening."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 already calibrated; gold thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 835 (breakeven+1.8%); no change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1360 already locks +8%; trail-gap 1.7% acceptable. Don't churn."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gain too small to trail; SL 2740 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 8950 unchanged; -0.3% position."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 provides support; SL 10440 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 print bullish, recovering today. Hold to SL 470."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1255 (entry+2.4% lock); no churn."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Need more cushion before trailing; +0.3% only."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position close to entry; SL 850 already tight."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 May 20; monitor proximity to Rule 11 binary window in coming sessions."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 mid-May; Halol overhang noted. Hold current SL pending exact results date."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Weakest of the book; let SL 1610 do its work."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Skipping NEW BUYs this tick despite cash 48%/deployed 52% deliberately: (1) VIX +7.84% to 18.16 with Nifty breaking 24,000 is a risk-off macro signal, not an accumulation day per philosophy section. (2) Realized -₹28,429 today (CHENNPETRO/AUBANK/INDUSINDBK realized losses earlier per cumulative -₹25,973); discipline says don't add new admit risk on a losing-day tape. (3) Existing book has 13 active CNC carries — adequate sector coverage (FMCG/Pharma/IT/CapGoods/Auto/Healthcare). Per-name reject pass on BULLISH watchlist candidates: INFY (+0.08) — IT sector already represented via COFORGE +9.7% winner, no need to stack; HCLTECH BEARISH (-0.10) — skip; TORNTPHARM — already have SUNPHARMA + LAURUSLABS pharma exposure, cluster cap; THERMAX — late-session entry on +9.3% gap-up, R:R unfavorable from chase; UPL — Q4 catalyst already played out today (+2.37%); BIOCON — already pharma-exposed; KOTAKBANK — financial-cluster expansion into risk-off PSU-bank collapse day inappropriate; MCX — niche play, 0.8x volume not conviction-grade; NIFTYBEES — no edge on a breaking-support day. Pending TATACONSUM LIMIT @1240 has run away (CMP 1251.60) — should monitor; if it doesn't fill by close, may cancel next tick (also already filled a portion holding 40 units).",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 52% / cash 47.6% is below soft 80% target, but the macro tape (VIX spike + Nifty breaking 24k + heavy sector breadth red) genuinely justifies the conservatism (Rule 18 fact-based risk-off case stated). Today's realized -₹28,429 reflects executed exits per Rule 17 discipline at SL/thesis-break — acceptable price for risk management. Book is well-positioned defensively: FMCG (MARICO/DABUR/TATACONSUM), Pharma (SUNPHARMA/LAURUSLABS), Healthcare (APOLLOHOSP/LALPATHLAB), IT winner (COFORGE +9.7%), Gold hedge (GOLDBEES). Key watch tomorrow: India CPI print and DRREDDY/CIPLA Q4 read-across for pharma. APOLLOHOSP Q4 May 20 and SUNPHARMA mid-May Q4 will enter Rule 11 binary window soon — pre-plan exits or risk-trims by end of next week."
}
